title: Solana Agent Token Launch Detector
description: Stream new SPL token mint events and pump.fun bonding curve graduations in real-time using GoldRush's event monitoring on `solana-mainnet`. When a token graduates (reaches ~$69K market cap and migrates to Raydium), emit a structured event with the mint address, initial Raydium pool address, launch liquidity in SOL, and top-10 early buyers — giving autonomous sniper and launch-monitor agents a clean trigger with full token context to act on immediately.
useCase: Build an autonomous token launch detector that fires a structured event with full context the moment a pump.fun token graduates to Raydium, enabling sniper agents to act within seconds.

keyParams.address: The pump.fun program address to monitor for graduation events
keyParams.tokenAddress: Newly graduated SPL token mint address to enrich with holder data
keyParams.page_size: Number of recent transactions to scan for graduation events
keyParams.block_signed_at_asc: Sort ascending to detect the exact graduation block
